The 7-Stage Pipeline
1
Identify
Find a new agency to target. Log their name, area/district, city, contact person, and phone number. Set the lead temperature: Hot (ready now), Warm (interested but not urgent), or Cold (unknown/untested).
✅ Move to Stage 2 once the agency is fully logged with contact details.
2
Qualify
Confirm the agency has at least 1 licensed broker. Log the total number of agents and how many hold a RERA broker license.
✅ Any agency with even 1 broker qualifies. Move to Stage 3 once counts are confirmed.
3
Outreach
Make first contact — walk-in visit, phone call, or WhatsApp. Introduce CMP and log the method, what they said, and their initial reaction the same day.
✅ Move to Stage 4 once a demo or meeting is agreed.
4
Demo
Present the CMP platform in person or over a screen share. Walk through listing, search, and lead management features. Have the app open and ready before entering.
✅ Move to Stage 5 once they agree to register at least one broker.
5
Register
Start registrations. Track the count as a ratio (e.g. 7 / 42). The progress bar turns green when ≥ 70% are registered.
✅ Move to Stage 6 once initial registrations are done.
6
Follow Up
Send a WhatsApp or email within 48 hours of each visit. Log every follow-up in the Visit Log with the date and outcome.
✅ Move to Stage 7 once the agency is actively listing on CMP.
7
Report
Mark whether a listing has been submitted. Update the final registration count. Set priority to Low if fully onboarded. This agency is now active on CMP.
✅ Agency is live. Check monthly to ensure brokers remain active.
Conditions & Rules
🔒 Agency Assignment Lock
Once a rep assigns an agency to themselves, it is permanently locked to them. The other rep cannot claim it. Disputes must go through Muhannad — not by overriding the system.
🏢 Qualifying an Agency
Any agency with at least 1 RERA-licensed broker qualifies. Prioritise agencies with more brokers — 40 brokers beats 2.
📊 Registration Tracking
Tracked as a ratio. Green ≥ 70% — strong. Amber 40–69% — in progress. Red < 40% — needs attention.
🌡️ Trust Levels
Hot — Visit within 24 hours. Warm — Follow up within 3 days. Cold — Approach within the week.
📝 Remarks Fields
Remarks from Agency — Verbatim what the contact said. Internal Notes — Your own observations and next steps (private to CMP team).
🚫 What Not to Do
• Don't contact an agency assigned to the other rep.
• Don't skip logging — even a voicemail counts.
• Don't move stages without a clear reason.
• Don't mark listing submitted unless the broker has actually listed on CMP.
Golden Rules
⚡
Log the same day
Every visit, call, or follow-up must be logged before end of working day.
🎯
Maximise registrations per agency
Register every licensed broker in the agency. Start with the owner, then work through the team.
⏱️
48-hour follow-up rule
After every meeting or demo, follow up within 48 hours to push for more sign-ups.
🔥
Prioritise by temperature
Hot within 24 hrs. Warm within 3 days. Cold within the week. Never let a Hot lead go cold.
🔐
Respect the assignment lock
If an agency is claimed, don't contact them. Check before you approach.
🛡️
Protect broker data
Broker information is confidential. Never share outside the CMP platform.
🔑 Change PIN

Update any user's PIN. They'll need it next time they sign in — instant lockout for ex-employees.
